title: eriogonum panguicense var. alpestre
intro: Eriogonum panguicense var. alpestre, also known as alpine buckwheat or mountain buckwheat, is a variety of the Eriogonum panguicense plant, a species of flowering plant in the buckwheat family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, and has been used to treat a range of health conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory issues. Eriogonum panguicense var. alpestre can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical salves.
